privileged_info_summary: The task is a fully generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new cross-platform VeraCrypt volume from scratch. It has been verified from the setup and export scripts that the agent must create the volume at '/home/ga/Volumes/dailies_transfer.hc' with an expected size of 64 MB, formatted as exFAT, and secured with the password 'ProductionSafe2024!'. The agent must also successfully copy the synthetically generated manifest file from '/home/ga/Documents/production_manifest.csv' into the volume before completely dismounting it.
